name: Administradora General de Fondos Sura, S.A. - Fondo de Inversion SURA Deuda Chile Fund
summary: Administradora General de Fondos Sura, S.A. - Fondo de Inversion SURA Deuda Chile Fund is a Chilean debt investment fund. It is managed by Administradora General de Fondos Sura, S.A. and focuses on generating returns through investments in Chilean debt instruments.
